ctx.name: Brian
ctx.notes: Brian has been traveling a lot and seems tired

introQueue.label: Energy read
introQueue.name: What's been giving you energy lately?
introQueue.description: Strengths-based, not scoped to work. Reveals what genuinely animates the person.

introQueue.label: Agenda check
introQueue.name: Before we get into it, anything you want to make sure we cover today?
introQueue.description: Semi-set early question. Gives the report explicit permission to set the agenda before the manager's plan takes over.

introQueue.label: Friction scan
introQueue.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
introQueue.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

introQueue.label: Opening pace check
introQueue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
introQueue.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

focus_points.label: Travel impact on energy and wellbeing.
focus_points.reason: Notes mention Brian has been traveling a lot and seems tired. Could be affecting his energy levels or motivation — worth clarifying how he's managing it.

focus_points.label: Current priorities amid frequent travel.
focus_points.reason: Whether they're still on the work that made them senior, or quietly being absorbed into firefighting.

focus_points.label: What he'd want more of from you right now.
focus_points.reason: Bi-weekly check-in default — the cleanest channel for him to redirect the relationship if something is off due to travel fatigue.

brief.coreIssue: Brian's frequent travel as a Food Critic Manager may be impacting his energy levels and motivation, potentially affecting his ability to focus on key priorities. This 1:1 should explore how he's managing these challenges and what support he needs from you.
brief.openingQuestion: What impact has the recent travel had on your energy and ability to focus on your main priorities?
listenFor: whether travel is affecting his energy levels
if they are still aligned with their main priorities
whether he needs more support from you
avoid: do not assume he is coping well with travel
do not suggest solutions without hearing his perspective
brief.goodOutcome: You and Brian have agreed on one adjustment to his workload or travel schedule to better support his energy and focus.
brief.suggestedAction: Discuss with Brian any immediate workload adjustments and check back in two weeks to assess impact.

issues: output may not reflect the meeting type distinctly

queueRef.label: Energy read
queueRef.name: What's been giving you energy lately?
queueRef.description: Strengths-based, not scoped to work. Reveals what genuinely animates the person.

queueRef.label: Agenda check
queueRef.name: Before we get into it, anything you want to make sure we cover today?
queueRef.description: Semi-set early question. Gives the report explicit permission to set the agenda before the manager's plan takes over.

queueRef.label: Friction scan
queueRef.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
queueRef.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

queueRef.label: Opening pace check
queueRef.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?
queueRef.description: Opener that invites a real answer rather than 'fine'. Reads wellbeing directly.

queueRef.label: Travel energy impact
queueRef.name: How is frequent travel affecting your energy levels and motivation?
queueRef.description: Explores how travel impacts Brian's energy and motivation.

queueRef.label: Priority alignment
queueRef.name: Which of your current priorities feels most critical right now?
queueRef.description: Identifies which priorities Brian sees as most important.

queueRef.label: Managing travel workload
queueRef.name: What strategies are you using to manage your workload with all the travel?
queueRef.description: Probes how Brian manages his workload given travel demands.

queueRef.label: Support needs
queueRef.name: What kind of support from me would make your workload more manageable?
queueRef.description: Surfaces what support Brian needs from the manager.

queueRef.label: Next steps clarity
queueRef.name: What do you need to move forward confidently in the next two weeks?
queueRef.description: Clarifies what Brian needs to maintain momentum.

queueRef.label: Delegation and focus
queueRef.name: What tasks could you delegate to maintain focus on your priorities?
queueRef.description: Encourages Brian to consider delegation to focus on priorities.

queueRef.label: Travel recovery
queueRef.name: How are you managing recovery after trips?
queueRef.description: Explores how Brian recovers from the fatigue of traveling.

queueRef.label: Priority setting
queueRef.name: What would make the next two weeks feel more balanced?
queueRef.description: Encourages Brian to identify areas for improvement in balance.

closer.label: Priority setting
closer.name: What would make the next two weeks feel more balanced?
closer.description: Encourages Brian to identify areas for improvement in balance.
